topic.what: Dynamic risk assessment combining Bayesian Attack Graphs with process mining for real-time vulnerability exploitation detection
topic.how: Process mining extracts packet-level patterns from malicious traffic; cosine similarity between online traffic and known patterns updates BAG conditional probability tables dynamically
topic.why_matters: Enables real-time probability updates of system compromise during ongoing attacks without relying on static CVSS scores alone

characteristics.what_it_measures: Cosine similarity between online traffic patterns and known malicious patterns
characteristics.evidence: Table III shows 99.9% similarity when vulnerability CVE-2023-0600 exploited
characteristics.context: During attack step II of AP1 at node RA:192.168.56.1

characteristics.what_itasures: Posterior probability of target node being compromised
characteristics.vs_baseline: vs 1.2% initial probability at attack step I
characteristics.evidence: Figure 4a shows probability progression through attack steps
characteristics.context: Target RA:10.0.0.3 after complete attack path execution

characteristics.what_it_measures: Misclassification of legitimate traffic as malicious
characteristics.evidence: Table III shows low similarity values for non-involved nodes during benign traffic phases
characteristics.context: Legitimate traffic correctly distinguished from attack patterns

characteristics.what_it_measures: Time from attack initiation to detection
characteristics.evidence: Progressive similarity increases tracked across attack steps I-IV
characteristics.context: Detection occurs at each attack step as traffic patterns match known exploits
